title: Hideo Kojima criticizes the end of physical discs on PlayStation and Sony confirms changes in distribution
summary: The creator of Metal Gear Solid expresses sadness over the gradual phasing out of physical games, while Sony reveals conditions for ordering discs after 2027.

title: New games announced for Nintendo Switch 2, including Final Fantasy XV and Hatsune Miku
summary: Square Enix hints at Final Fantasy XV coming to Switch 2, specifications for Dragon Quest XI S are revealed, and Hatsune Miku Starry Party is announced.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved confirms physical disc release, even on PS5
summary: The Halo remake will arrive in physical format, ensuring tangible ownership of the game on all platforms.

title: Meccha Chameleon reaches 15 million copies sold in less than 30 days
summary: The game celebrates the sales milestone and teases a collaboration with a famous Japanese star.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners will have a second season with a style more Scorsese than Bay
summary: The studio behind Cyberpunk: Edgerunners is also preparing more Delicious in Dungeon content and a new project from the creators of Promare.

title: Marvel Rivals players debate whether Captain America's 'bulge' was reduced or is a visual illusion
summary: The community speculates about a possible design change to the character, generating memes and optical theories.

title: Crimson Desert receives update 1.13.00 that powers up characters Damiane and Oongka
summary: The new version of the open-world RPG improves gameplay and adds content for two of its key characters.

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls blocked in 132 countries for requiring PlayStation Network linking
summary: The Marvel fighting game is unavailable in over a hundred countries due to the controversial mandatory PSN connection.

title: Nintendo president promises to fight Pokémon card scalpers
summary: After printing billions of cards without meeting demand, Nintendo announces measures against speculators.

title: Streamer ExtraEmily banned from Twitch for nearly causing a car accident live
summary: The content creator was suspended for performing a dangerous maneuver during a live broadcast.

title: First English trailer for Yoko Taro's Evangelion series now available
summary: The Evangelion adaptation by the creator of Nier shows its first official preview with English dialogue.

title: Sonic Mania: the game that revitalized Sega's blue hedgehog franchise
summary: An analysis explains how Sonic Mania managed to restore the series' popularity after years of inconsistent titles.

title: The seventh Shantae game will arrive in 2027, according to official announcement
summary: The new installment of the half-genie saga has been confirmed for release in two years.

title: Over 300,000 signatures ask Love and Deepspace developers to bring back the 'sexy werewolf'
summary: The mobile game community mobilizes to have the removed character reinstated.

title: Danganronpa 2x2 suffers a delay and will not arrive until 2027
summary: The sequel to the mystery and trial game is postponed to ensure its quality and content.

title: Experts believe it is unlikely that GTA 6 will reach 60 fps on consoles
summary: Analysts point out that hardware technical limitations make a stable 60 frames per second rate unlikely.

title: Seven essential games to download from the PS3 store before its closure
summary: The list includes titles that should not be missed when the PS3 PlayStation Store permanently closes.

title: Persona 4 Revival shows its first trailer with Rise Kujikawa
summary: The trailer features idol Rise Kujikawa as part of the return of the classic RPG.

title: Epic Games settles lawsuit against former employee accused of leaking Fortnite collaborations
summary: The judicial agreement closes the case of the contractor who allegedly revealed confidential information about popular game collaborations.

title: Sega shows a preview of the new Sonic animated short
summary: The company releases a sneak peek of the next short film starring the blue hedgehog.
